executives.name: Leonardo Contreras Lerdo de Tejada
executives.background: Director since 2014. Vice President of Administration of Grupo Mexico since 2014.

board_of_directors.name: Xavier Garcia de Quevedo Topete
board_of_directors.background: Vice Chairman of the Board since 2014. Director since 1999. Previously served as President of Minera Mexico from 2001 to 2014.
